root.m_Talk_DEU: Krrgh...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Krrgh...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-th-this stake is....?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-th-this stake is....?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-th-this stake is....?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah ha ha hah! Who do you think it is? It's Rivet, the adorable bunny of the Society!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah ha ha hah! Who do you think it is? It's Rivet, the adorable bunny of the Society!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah ha ha hah! Who do you think it is? It's Rivet, the adorable bunny of the Society!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Society was sooo peaceful that I didn't have a chance to shoot recently.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Society was sooo peaceful that I didn't have a chance to shoot recently.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Society was sooo peaceful that I didn't have a chance to shoot recently.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so, sooo grateful to you for breaking out, Dean of Archeology!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so, sooo grateful to you for breaking out, Dean of Archeology!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so, sooo grateful to you for breaking out, Dean of Archeology!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, as a token of my appreciation, I'll shoot down them all!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, as a token of my appreciation, I'll shoot down them all!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, as a token of my appreciation, I'll shoot down them all!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to refuse!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to refuse!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to refuse!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, sir! It's the lunatic who's under the President!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, sir! It's the lunatic who's under the President!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, sir! It's the lunatic who's under the President!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rivet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rivet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rivet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems like Ms. MacCready wanted you to do this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems like Ms. MacCready wanted you to do this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems like Ms. MacCready wanted you to do this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yessir! She said something about you needlessly provoking the Institution or something. Anyway! She wanted me to bring you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yessir! She said something about you needlessly provoking the Institution or something. Anyway! She wanted me to bring you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yessir! She said something about you needlessly provoking the Institution or something. Anyway! She wanted me to bring you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She never said you had to be alive, so a few skewers should be fine, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She never said you had to be alive, so a few skewers should be fine, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She never said you had to be alive, so a few skewers should be fine, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Under Mother's care, we will soon become one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Under Mother's care, we will soon become one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Under Mother's care, we will soon become one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fear not death, everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fear not death, everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fear not death, everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! Wait!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! Wait!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! Wait!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You all just creeped up on me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You all just creeped up on me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You all just creeped up on me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you're all welcome!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you're all welcome!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you're all welcome!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rivet, I'm sorry, but go back and tell Ms. MacCready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rivet, I'm sorry, but go back and tell Ms. MacCready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rivet, I'm sorry, but go back and tell Ms. MacCready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That my curiosity is beyond the Lake that the Society pursued all along.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That my curiosity is beyond the Lake that the Society pursued all along.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That my curiosity is beyond the Lake that the Society pursued all along.
